TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Katerina Sakellaropoulou ryax sa tay 30 nqu tay 5, Katerina Sakellaropoulou, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1956) mrhuw Greece ta' misuw hya' ga Katerina Sakellaropoulou, aring ryax tay 13 squ byacing tay 3 sa kawas 2020 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. qyanux na sraral Katerina Sakellaropoulou minkahul sa Thessaloniki na Greece. minqyanux ru qnxan ngasal 1956 kawas: hitgan. qnxan nya cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' == canpyuta hknyun ==
S.PHON: katerina s~…ēakellaropoulou rjax s~…ēa taj ** nqu taj *, katerina s~…ēakellaropoulou, s~…ēquliq na s~…ēezi Ē. (minńßtuw s~…ēa kawas~…ē taj ****) mrńßuw …£ree ¶~ ®e ta Ē mis~…ēuw ńßja Ē …£a katerina s~…ēakellaropoulou, ariŇč rjax taj ** s~…ēqu ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč taj * s~…ēa kawas~…ē **** l…£a, mus~…ēa Ē s~…ēpazjaŇč ő≤alaj ms~…ē Ērux kja la. qjanux na s~…ēraral katerina s~…ēakellaropoulou minkańßul s~…ēa tńßes~…ēs~…ēaloniki na …£ree ¶~ ®e. minqjanux ru qnxan Ňčas~…ēal **** kawas~…ē: ńßit…£an. qnxan nja ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē == ¶~ ®anpjuta ńßknjun ==
